group_overview.title: Hua rōpū
group_overview.description: Rōpūhia ngā hua ōrite hei tiritiri me te whakaatu arotake ngātahi, whakakotahi i ngā mōkihi, ā, waihanga whakaaturanga arotake ritenga me te kore uaua.
group_overview.delete_group_message: Mēnā ka muku koe i te rōpū, ka wehea ngā arotake katoa, ā, ka hoki ki ō rātou hua taketake. Kāore koe e whai wāhi atu, ā, kāore e taea te whakahoki tēnei mahi. Kei te hiahia tonu koe ki te haere tonu?
group_overview.limit_function: Whakapiki ki tētahi mahere ake kia whakamahia tēnei āhuatanga. <1>Tirohia ngā utu</1>

create_group_page.title: Waihanga Hua Rōpū
create_group_page.product_in_this_group: Ngā hua i roto i tēnei rōpū
create_group_page.sub_description: Tīpakohia te hua hei tāpiri ki tēnei rōpū
create_group_page.unsaved_change_title: Kei te tino hiahia koe ki te puta?
create_group_page.unsaved_change_message: Kāore anō tō rōpū kia tiakina. Mēnā ka puta koe, ka ngaro ō tautuhinga. Kei te hiahia tonu koe ki te haere tonu?

group_detail_page.products_in_group: Ngā hua i roto i te rōpū
group_detail_page.reviews_in_group: Ngā arotake i roto i te rōpū
group_detail_page.delete_confirm_message: Kei te tino hiahia koe ki te muku i tēnei hua?
